title: Build a Job Queue System
input_format: Job definitions with type, payload, priority, and scheduling options
output_format: Job status updates, completion results, and queue statistics
constraints: Must support job priorities. Must handle retries with exponential backoff. Must support delayed/scheduled jobs. Must handle concurrent workers safely.
function_signature: class JobQueue { add(type: string, payload: any, options?: JobOptions): Promise<Job>; process(type: string, handler: JobHandler): void; getJob(id: string): Promise<Job>; getStats(): QueueStats; }
